LABEL: 
Claim Next Generation (NG) Accountable Care Organization (ACO) Indicator Code 1–5 
DESCRIPTION: This field represents the benefit enhancement indicator that identifies these are Next Generation (NG) 
Accountable Care Organization (ACO) claims that qualify for specific claims processing
